{{Infobox character
| name = Grandmaster Avernus
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Grandmaster
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

''See also: [[Grandmaster Avernus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Grandmaster [[Avernus]] was a high-ranking leader who commanded significant authority and respect among her peers. Characterized by her long silver or gray hair, she often maintained a composed and rigid demeanor, though she eventually met her end after losing her strength and composure. Her leadership involved managing [[Travelers]] and coordinating with figures such as [[Overlord]] [[Lysander]], who supported her cause in [[Damasca]]. She was aware of the political shifts involving powerful figures and the potential impact of the [[Incarnations]] on established power structures. Her death occurred following a period of intense pressure where she appeared uncharacteristically lost.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Grandmaster [[Avernus]] is a tall, refined woman characterized by her straight silver hair, which she sometimes adorns with feathers. During a meeting attended in casual robes, she reported that a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] had placed [[Grandmaster Asphodel]]'s head into a sack. While accompanied by an owl on one shoulder and a raven on the other, she expressed regret that [[Alin]] had been excluded from the decision-making process. Despite her severe appearance and the banner she carries featuring a four-feather fan, she claimed that Heir [[Talos]] would be located within the [[Damascan camp]]. It is also noted that [[Indirial]] has had prior meetings with her.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Avernus]] is a severe-looking woman with straight silver hair and a banner featuring a fan of four feathers on a brown-and-white background.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Avernus]] is a tall, refined woman with feathers in her silver hair.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Avernus]] reported that a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] threw [[Grandmaster Asphodel]]'s head in a sack.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Avernus]] has long gray hair and was attending a meeting in casual robes.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Avernus]] was apologetic about [[Alin]] being left out of the decision-making process.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Avernus]] has an owl on one shoulder and a raven on the other.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Avernus]] claimed they would find Heir [[Talos]] in the [[Damascan camp]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Indirial]] has met [[Grandmaster Avernus]] before.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A [[Grandmaster Avernus]] once predicted [[Alin]] would free the [[Incarnations]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Grandmaster Avernus sat at the end of the table, her long gray hair hastily tied back. Judging by her casual robes, someone had woken her for this meeting."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
